infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Drop uses your camera to scan QR codes on swap boxes and to take drop-off proof photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Drop uses your photo library to attach photos to your listings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Drop saves drop-off proof photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Drop uses your location to show nearby swap boxes on the map.
